posts.text: Chinese whisky is soaring in popularity. Some of the biggest booze companies are pouring in and China has never shipped more of the stuff. The trend comes at a curious moment https://www.economist.com/business/2026/04/22/the-curious-rise-of-chinese-whisky?taid=69eeb9c4e23f1b000178e39e&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text:
I keep hearing about scammers using WhatsApp or this platform, impersonating me and charging for investment advice and stock tips. Etc.  

I don’t have any paid services.  I don’t contact people on WhatsApp and give stock tips. 

Please report and block imposters.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
